title: Guns Survival Multiplayer
body:
This modpack Strives to give you a fun and new minecraft experience with the addions of guns, cars, mechs, ships, and much much more. 
At the same time this modpack will not divate too much from the core game that you know and love. 
This modpack also already comes before equipped with opization mods to help your game run smoother.

This modlist is for the most updated version of the modpack
The mods included in this pack are:
1. [TaCZ] Timeless and Classics Zero
by craneblock6666

by frikinjay

by squeek502
